label: Privacy, governance, licensing & audit

node.label: Privacy, governance, licensing & audit
node.definition: Privacy and governance combine data rights, consent, access control, licensing, retention, audit, risk ownership, and regulatory obligations.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Privacy, governance, licensing & audit is to connect Federated & privacy-preserving learning, Databases & information retrieval to downstream capabilities including API gateways, tool registries & secure connectors, Medical imaging & clinical decision support, Content credentials, signing & provenance.
examples: substrate for API gateways, tool registries & secure connectors
substrate for Medical imaging & clinical decision support
substrate for Content credentials, signing & provenance
limitations: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Federated & privacy-preserving learning, Databases & information retrieval.

dependencies.rationale: Privacy, governance, licensing & audit measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Federated & privacy-preserving learning.
Privacy, governance, licensing & audit measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Databases & information retrieval.
Privacy, governance, licensing & audit measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Human evaluation & preference studies.
